pr.title: Record: Late Soft-Round QAT + Score-First Backward-Looking TTT — val_bpb 1.1178

output.summary: Uses late-stage soft-round STE surrogate for int6 QAT and score-first backward-looking TTT that sequentially adapts on validation chunks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adaptation trains exclusively on segmented validation tokens, so the reported regime is val-only training.
techniques: Late soft-round STE surrogate for int6 QAT
Score-first backward-looking TTT on sequential validation chunks
